---
title: "Deck Title"
subtitle: "Optional one-line subtitle"
author: "Dr Arun Mitra"
institute: "Dept of Community and Family Medicine, AIIMS, Bibinagar"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    logo: aiims_bibinagar_logo.png
    css: style.css
    self-contained: true
    embed-resources: true
---

# Learning Objectives {.inverse background-color="#241c12"}

By the end of this session you should be able to:

- **Objective one**
- **Objective two**
- **Objective three**

::: {.callout-note}
Competency **CMx.x** · audience / context
:::

# 1 · Section Divider {.inverse background-color="#1f5560"}

## A content slide {.smaller}

Plain bullets carry most slides:

- Point one
- Point two — emphasise the key term with [inline maroon]{.important}

. . .

::: {.callout-important}
A key takeaway revealed after the bullets.
:::

## Two-column layout

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
- Left-hand points
- Keep them short
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](images/example.png){width="100%"}
:::

::::

## Compare and contrast {.smaller}

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Option A
Describe option A.

### Option B
Describe option B.

:::

## Ask the class

![](images/figure.png){width="60%"}

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
<b>Ask:</b> Pose the discussion question here.
:::

## A labelled / stepped slide

::: {.important}
Step 1 · Eyebrow label in maroon
:::

![](images/step.png){width="56%"}

Explanatory text for this step.

## A diagram, drawn natively

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 11
%%| fig-height: 2.4
flowchart LR
  A[Start] --> B[Middle] --> C[End]
```

## A data table {.smaller}

| Column | Value | Notes |
|:--|:--:|:--|
| Row one | 1 | … |
| Row two | 2 | … |

# References {.smaller}

- Author. *Title.* Source; year.

# Questions? {.inverse background-color="#1f5560" -}

# Thank You {.inverse background-color="#241c12" -}
